description.content: Weather forecasts at multiple granularities and time horizons.

Returns forecast weather data with 3-hour granularity for the next 5 days for the supplied latitude and longitude. Includes temperature, weather conditions, wind, precipitation probability, and more for 40 forecast timestamps.

query.description: (Required) Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.
(Required) Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.
Number of timestamps to return. Defaults to 40.
Response format. Default is JSON.
Units of measurement. standard, metric, or imperial.
Localization language code.
(Required) OpenWeather API key.

response.name: Five day three hour forecast response.
Unauthorized. Missing or invalid API key.

description.content: Returns hourly forecast weather data for the next 4 days (up to 96 hourly timestamps) for the supplied latitude and longitude. Available on Developer, Professional, and Expert plans.

query.description: (Required) Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.
(Required) Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.
Number of hourly timestamps to return. Up to 96.
Response format. Default is JSON.
Units of measurement. standard, metric, or imperial.
Localization language code.
(Required) OpenWeather API key.

description.content: Returns daily forecast weather data for up to 16 days for the supplied latitude and longitude. Each daily entry includes morning, day, evening, night, and min/max temperatures.

query.description: (Required) Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.
(Required) Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.
Number of days to return. 1 to 16.
Response format. Default is JSON.
Units of measurement. standard, metric, or imperial.
Localization language code.
(Required) OpenWeather API key.

description.content: Returns daily climatic forecast weather data for the next 30 days for the supplied latitude and longitude.

query.description: (Required) Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.
(Required) Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.
Number of days to return. 1 to 30.
Response format. Default is JSON.
Units of measurement. standard, metric, or imperial.
Localization language code.
(Required) OpenWeather API key.

description.content:
OpenWeather forecast APIs including 5-day/3-hour forecast, Hourly Forecast 4 Days, Daily Forecast 16 Days, and Climatic Forecast 30 Days. These forecasts provide weather predictions at varying granularities and time horizons for any global coordinate.

Contact Support:
 Name: OpenWeather
